# DocuForge

> PDF generation API for developers. HTML in, pixel-perfect PDF out.

## Docs
- [Quickstart](https://fred-7da601c6.mintlify.app/quickstart)
- [HTML to PDF](https://fred-7da601c6.mintlify.app/api-reference/generate)
- [Templates](https://fred-7da601c6.mintlify.app/api-reference/templates)
- [API Reference](https://fred-7da601c6.mintlify.app/api-reference/generate)
- [Full LLM Docs](https://getdocuforge.dev/llms-full.txt)

## SDKs
- TypeScript: `npm install docuforge` — `DocuForge` class with `generate()`, `fromTemplate()`, `fromReact()`, `batch()`, `templates.*`
- Python: `pip install docuforge` — mirrors TS SDK API, uses httpx + Pydantic v2
- Go: `go get github.com/docuforge/docuforge-go` — stdlib net/http, functional options, context-based API
- Ruby: `gem install docuforge` — uses Faraday HTTP client, idiomatic Ruby API

## Core Endpoints
- `POST /v1/generate` — Generate PDF from HTML, React (JSX/TSX), or template + data. Supports watermarks, headers/footers with `{{pageNumber}}`/`{{totalPages}}`.
- `POST /v1/generate/batch` — Async batch generation via job queue. Returns 202 with job IDs.
- `GET /v1/generations/:id` — Get generation status and result.
- `GET /v1/generations` — List generation history.

## PDF Tools
- `POST /v1/pdf/merge` — Merge multiple PDFs (base64 input).
- `POST /v1/pdf/split` — Split PDF by page ranges.
- `POST /v1/pdf/protect` — Add password protection.
- `POST /v1/pdf/info` — Get PDF metadata (page count, size, etc.).
- `POST /v1/pdf/sign` — Add visual digital signature.
- `POST /v1/pdf/pdfa` — Convert to PDF/A-1b archival format.
- `POST /v1/pdf/forms/fill` — Fill form fields in existing PDF.
- `POST /v1/pdf/forms/add-fields` — Add form fields (text, checkbox, dropdown).
- `POST /v1/pdf/forms/list-fields` — List form fields in a PDF.

## Templates
- `POST /v1/templates` — Create template (Handlebars syntax: `{{variable}}`, `{{#each}}`, `{{#if}}`).
- `GET /v1/templates` — List templates.
- `GET /v1/templates/:id` — Get template with version info.
- `PUT /v1/templates/:id` — Update template (auto-increments version).
- `DELETE /v1/templates/:id` — Delete template.
- `GET /v1/templates/:id/versions` — List version history.
- `POST /v1/templates/:id/restore` — Restore to previous version.

## Template Marketplace
- `GET /v1/marketplace` — Browse public community templates.
- `POST /v1/marketplace/:id/clone` — Clone a public template to your account.
- `POST /v1/marketplace/:id/publish` — Publish your template.
- `GET /v1/starter-templates` — 5 pre-built starter templates (no auth required).
- `POST /v1/starter-templates/:slug/clone` — Clone a starter template.

## React-to-PDF
Send JSX/TSX directly via `react` field in `/v1/generate`. Server transpiles with esbuild and renders via `renderToStaticMarkup`. Component library `@docuforge/react` provides: Document, Page, Header, Footer, Table, Grid, Watermark, Barcode, Signature, List, Divider, PageNumber.

## QR Codes & Barcodes
Use `{{qr:data}}` and `{{barcode:data}}` placeholders in HTML. Replaced with inline SVGs during rendering.

## AI Template Generation
- `POST /v1/ai/generate-template` — AI-powered template generation using Claude. Requires `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY`.

## MCP Server
`@docuforge/mcp-server` for AI agent integration (Claude Desktop, Cursor, Claude Code). Provides 7 tools for generating PDFs, managing templates, and querying usage from AI assistants.

## Usage & Billing
- `GET /v1/usage` — Current billing period stats.
- Plans: Free (1K PDFs/mo), Starter $29 (10K), Pro $99 (100K), Enterprise (unlimited).
- Rate limits: Free 10 req/s, Starter/Pro 100 req/s, Enterprise 500 req/s.

## Quick Example
```typescript
import { DocuForge } from 'docuforge';
const df = new DocuForge('df_live_...');
const pdf = await df.generate({
  html: '<h1>Invoice #1234</h1>',
  options: { format: 'A4', margin: '1in' }
});
console.log(pdf.url);
```
